hero.title: Run Your Shop Smarter, Sell Faster, Profit More
hero.subtitle: Nafaa is the all-in-one POS, inventory, and accounting platform built for Pakistan's shopkeepers. Trusted by thousands of bakeries, kiryana stores, mobile shops, and pharmacies across Pakistan.
hero.no_cc: No credit card required • Setup in 5 minutes

features.title: Everything Your Shop Needs
features.subtitle: From POS to profit reports — Nafaa handles it all

pos.title: Lightning-Fast POS
pos.desc: Process sales in seconds with barcode scanning, multi-payment support, and instant receipts.

inventory.title: Smart Inventory
inventory.desc: Auto-track stock, low-stock alerts, multi-shop transfers, and waste reduction.

khata.title: Digital Khata
khata.desc: Replace your paper khata with digital ledgers. Track udhaar, send reminders via WhatsApp.

reports.title: Real-Time Reports
reports.desc: See sales, profit, and trends live. Export to Excel/PDF anytime.

multishop.title: Multi-Shop Ready
multishop.desc: Manage 1, 5, or 50 branches from one dashboard with role-based access.

offline.title: Works Offline
offline.desc: No internet? No problem. Continue selling — data syncs when online.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business. Cancel anytime.

cta.title: Ready to Grow Your Business?
cta.subtitle: Join 5,000+ Pakistani shops already using Nafaa

footer.tagline: Pakistan's #1 retail OS — built with ❤️ in Lahore
